stemHtml: An aeroplane is approaching the runway for landing. During the flare, it stalls without warning and experiences a hard landing. What factor could explain this?

options.a: The pitot tube was blocked, resulting in false airspeed indications.
options.b: The AoA sensor vane was stuck in one position.
options.c: The stall warning light was defective.
options.d: The stick shaker motor was burnt out.
